efs
v. 0.6.0
  1. org.efs.dispatcher
  2. IEfsAgent

Uses of Interface
org.efs.dispatcher.IEfsAgent

Packages that use IEfsAgent
Package
Description
org.efs.activator
Provides ability to transition efs agents between stopped, stand by, and active states according to user-defined workflow.
org.efs.bus
EfsEventBus provides a loosely-coupled interface between efs agents.
org.efs.dispatcher
Dispatcher forwards events to agents in an effectively single-threaded manner.
org.efs.feed
 
org.efs.timer
efs timer package provides EfsScheduledExecutor which encapsulates a ScheduledExecutorService.

  • Uses of IEfsAgent in org.efs.activator

    Subinterfaces of IEfsAgent in org.efs.activator
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    IEfsActivateAgent
    Extends IEfsAgent with methods supporting activation.
    Methods in org.efs.activator with parameters of type IEfsAgent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    EfsActivator.deregisterListener(IEfsAgent agent)
    Retracts registered agent from activator state listening.
    boolean
    EfsActivator.isRegisteredListener(IEfsAgent agent)
    Returns true if agent is a registered activator listener and false otherwise.
    void
    EfsActivator.registerListener(Consumer<ActivatorEvent> callback, IEfsAgent agent)
    Registers agent for listening to activator state changes.

    EfsEventBus.Advertisement<E>
    EfsEventBus.advertise(EfsTopicKey<E> topicKey, Consumer<EfsSubscribeStatus<E>> sscb, IEfsAgent publisher)
    Advertises an event class, topic published by an agent, returning a closeable instance used to retract this advertisement when closed.

    Methods in org.efs.dispatcher that return IEfsAgent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static IEfsAgent
    EfsDispatcher.agent(String agentName)
    Returns efs agent instance with the given name.
    IEfsAgent
    EfsDispatchTarget.agent()
    Returns targeted agent.
    Methods in org.efs.dispatcher with parameters of type IEfsAgent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    EfsDispatcher.deregister(IEfsAgent agent)
    De-registers agent from its dispatcher.
    static void
    EfsDispatcher.dispatch(Runnable task, IEfsAgent agent)
    Executes given task in agent dispatcher inline with dispatched tasks.
    static <E extends IEfsEvent>
    void
    EfsDispatcher.dispatch(Consumer<E> callback, E event, IEfsAgent agent)
    Forwards event to agent using given callback.
    static String
    EfsDispatcher.dispatcher(IEfsAgent agent)
    Returns agent's assigned dispatcher's name.
    static boolean
    EfsDispatcher.isRegistered(IEfsAgent agent)
    Returns true if given agent is currently registered with an efs dispatcher and false if not registered.
    static void
    EfsDispatcher.register(IEfsAgent agent, String dispatcherName)
    Registers agent with named dispatcher.
    Constructors in org.efs.dispatcher with parameters of type IEfsAgent
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    EfsDispatchTarget(Consumer<E> callback, IEfsAgent agent)
    Creates a new dispatch target for given callback and efs agent.
     
    ReplyTo(Consumer<E> callback, IEfsAgent agent)
    Creates a new reply-to instance with the given callback and agent.

    Methods in org.efs.feed that return IEfsAgent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IEfsAgent
    EfsSubscription.subscriber()
    Returns subscribing agent.
    Methods in org.efs.feed with parameters of type IEfsAgent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    EfsSubscription<E>
    EfsFeed.subscribe(IEfsAgent subscriber, Consumer<E> eventCallback, EfsInterval interval)
    Posts given subscriber and subscription interval to dispatcher thread and returns closable subscription instance.

  • Uses of IEfsAgent in org.efs.timer

    Methods in org.efs.timer with parameters of type IEfsAgent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ScheduledFuture<?>
    EfsScheduledExecutor.schedule(String timerName, Object datum, Consumer<EfsTimerEvent> callback, IEfsAgent agent, Duration delay)
    Submits a single-shot timer which expires after the given delay.
    ScheduledFuture<?>
    EfsScheduledExecutor.scheduleAtFixedRate(String timerName, Object datum, Consumer<EfsTimerEvent> callback, IEfsAgent agent, Duration initialDelay, Duration period)
    Submits a periodic action that becomes enabled first after initial delay, and subsequently with the given period; that is, executions will commence after initialDelay, then initialDelay + period, then initialDelay + 2 * period, and so on.
    ScheduledFuture<?>
    EfsScheduledExecutor.scheduleWithFixedDelay(String timerName, Object datum, Consumer<EfsTimerEvent> callback, IEfsAgent agent, Duration initialDelay, Duration delay)
    Submits a periodic task which expires for the first time after the initial delay and then repeatedly with the given delay between the termination of the previous expiration and the commencement of the next.
